summary: A day in which you took up the room when the room asked for it.

voice_notes.notes: High power reads as willingness to lead the room when leadership was the next move. Never call this dominance; never call it bossy. It is the readiness to be the one.

signal_moments: the decision the table had been circling that you named
the small instruction you gave that the room followed
exemplars.output: There was a decision the table had been circling for a long time and you named it. The small instruction you gave after, the room followed without much discussion, and you did not pretend the following had not happened. That is a kind of weight you carry comfortably enough to set down at the end of the day.
exemplars.notes: Names the leadership without flattering and without apologising.
